positive: A stylized, whimsical nocturnal forest scene. Central composition featuring towering, geometric trees with delicate, bioluminescent glowing canopies. The background is a deep indigo cosmic void speckled with ultra-detailed constellations and crescent moons. Floating elements include stylized glowing orbs and gentle nebulae swirls. Use strong, contrasting silhouettes (dark shapes against bright glows). The overall aesthetic is a blend of minimalist vector art and detailed digital painting. Vibrant jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) against deep blacks and blues. Clean lines, high contrast, highly print-friendly for apparel, symmetry, mystical glow, nature core art.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, ugly, poorly drawn, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, noisy
